# GLM-5.2 ShortGPT BI scoring report

Block Influence (BI) = 1 - cos(h_in, h_out) where h_in = previous layer's
residual and h_out = this layer's residual (per token, averaged over prompts).
Lower BI ⟹ more redundant layer ⟹ better prune candidate (ShortGPT heuristic).

- Total BI records ingested: **457605**
- Distinct layers scored: **77**
- Prune target: **16** lowest-BI layers (21% of 77 normal layers)

## Prune plan

Layers to drop (original indices, by ascending BI): **[3, 5, 7, 11, 42, 44, 46, 48, 51, 53, 56, 58, 60, 62, 64, 67]**

Resulting model: 77→61 normal layers
